description: Migrate the Retool plugin to use SDK utilities: replace manual cookie parsing with getCookie and replace manual waitForAuth with waitUntil.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/retool && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Migrate Retool plugin to SDK utilities
userStories.description: Replace Retool's manual cookie parsing and waitForAuth with SDK equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: getXsrfToken function uses getCookie('xsrfToken') from SDK instead of manual document.cookie.split
waitForAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
No setInterval or clearInterval calls remain in auth code
